model_card.card_text: Claude Opus 4.5 demonstrates exceptional performance across multiple benchmarks: 89.2% on SWE-bench Verified, 90.1% on MMLU, 94.7% on HumanEval, 82.4% on GPQA Diamond, and 96.8% on GSM8K. The model achieves 85.3% on MATH and 76.2% on TruthfulQA, showcasing strong reasoning and safety characteristics.

GLM-4.5-Flash from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 2
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** fast, efficient inference

Llama 3.2 Vision 11B - Multimodal Transformer with vision adapter. Parameters: 11B (10.6B active). Architecture: Cross-attention vision adapter + Llama 3.1 language model. Max context: 128K tokens. Trained on 6B image-text pairs.

Vision Benchmarks:
- MMMU (val, CoT): 50.7% (0-shot, college-level reasoning)
- MMMU-Pro Standard: 33.0% (10 options, test)
- MMMU-Pro Vision: 23.7% (test)
- MathVista: 51.5% (testmini, mathematical reasoning + vision)
- ChartQA: 83.4% (test, CoT, chart understanding)
- AI2 Diagram: 91.1% (test, diagram understanding)
- DocVQA: 88.4% (test, ANLS, document OCR + understanding)
- VQAv2: 75.2% (test, visual question answering)
- TextVQA: 73.1% (val, text in images)

Text Benchmarks:
- MMLU: 73.0%
- MATH: 51.9%
- GPQA: 32.8%

Capabilities: Visual question answering, image captioning, document OCR and analysis, chart/diagram understanding, visual reasoning, multilingual text (8 languages). Supports commercial use.

Granite 3.3 8B - IBM's enterprise-grade code model. Parameters: 8B. Architecture: Dense Transformer with Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) code completion. Max context: 128K tokens.

Capabilities: Fill-in-the-Middle code completion, function calling, structured reasoning, extended context. Optimized for enterprise coding workflows.

Benchmarks:
- Strong performance on code completion benchmarks
- Function calling capabilities
- 128K context window for large codebase understanding

GLM-4.6V-FlashX from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 3
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, fast, efficient inference

GLM-4.5-AirX from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 5
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

GLM-4-32B-0414-128K from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 15
**Parameters:** 32B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

GLM 5.1 Cloud - Advanced agentic, reasoning and coding capabilities.

Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 78.5%

Capabilities: Software engineering, agentic workflows, reasoning tasks.
Extended context window for document processing.

Architecture: Dense transformer with agentic capabilities.
License: Commercial API via Z.ai.

Hermes 3 8B - Generalist model with advanced agentic capabilities.

Capabilities: Function calling, structured output, roleplaying,
tool use, agentic workflows.
Based on Llama 3.1 architecture with extended capabilities.

Architecture: 8B parameter dense transformer.
Context: 128K tokens.
License: MIT (Llama 3.1 based)

GLM-4.6V from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 10
**Parameters:** 32B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, general text generation and analysis

GLM-5-Turbo from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 1
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

GLM-4.6V-Flash from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 1
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, fast, efficient inference

DeepSeek R1 14B - Distilled reasoning model from 671B teacher. Architecture: MoE (Mixture-of-Experts). Activated parameters: 14B. Total teacher parameters: 671B. Max context: 128K tokens.

Benchmarks (full R1):
- MMLU: 90.8% (Pass@1)
- MMLU-Pro: 84.0%
- GPQA: 71.5% (Pass@1)
- AIME 2024: 79.8% (Pass@1)
- AIME 2025: 81.5%
- MATH-500: 97.3%
- LiveCodeBench: 65.9%
- SWE-bench Verified: 49.2%

Capabilities: Chain-of-thought reasoning, STEM problem solving, coding, long-context understanding. Distilled version for local deployment. MIT license. Licensed under MIT.

GLM-4.7-Flash from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 1
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** fast, efficient inference

MiniMax M2.7 Cloud - Achieves 78% on SWE-bench multi-benchmark coverage.

Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench: 78% (multi-benchmark coverage)

Capabilities: Best-in-class coverage across multiple evaluation suites.
Advanced coding capabilities, software engineering tasks.

Architecture: Dense transformer with comprehensive benchmark optimization.
License: Commercial API access.

GLM-4.5V from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 10
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, general text generation and analysis

GPT-4.1 achieves 85.4% on SWE-bench Verified, 88.7% on MMLU, 92.3 on HumanEval pass@1, and scores 78.2% on GPQA Diamond. The model also demonstrates 95.3% accuracy on GSM8K and 83.6% on MATH benchmark. On TruthfulQA, it achieves 74.5%.

CogVideoX-3 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Video Generation Model
**Family:** Zhipu AI
**Concurrency Limit:** 1

GLM-OCR from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 2
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 32K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, document OCR and analysis, general text generation and analysis

GLM-5V-Turbo from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 1
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** vision-language understanding, general text generation and analysis

Devstral 2 123B Cloud - Software engineering agent capabilities built by Mistral.

Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 72.2%

Capabilities: Excels at using tools to explore codebases,
editing multiple files, agentic software development workflows.

Architecture: 123B parameter dense transformer.
License: Commercial API via Mistral/La Plateforme.

MiniMax M2.5 Cloud - High-efficiency LLM optimized for coding and agentic workflows.

Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 80.2%

Capabilities: Software engineering, coding tasks, agentic workflows,
function calling, extended long-context understanding.

Architecture: Dense transformer optimized for reasoning and code generation.
License: Commercial API access.

Nomic Embed Text v2 MoE - Multilingual Mixture-of-Experts text embedding model.

Architecture: MoE-based embedding architecture.
Parameters: Efficient MoE design.
Context: 8K tokens.

Capabilities: Multilingual embeddings, semantic search,
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), cross-lingual tasks,
long-context embedding for documents.

Benchmar ks:
- Excelling at multilingual retrieval
- Competitive with larger dense models

License: Apache 2.0

GLM-ASR-2512 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Real-time Audio-Video Model
**Family:** GLM-ASR
**Concurrency Limit:** 5

Kimi K2.5 Cloud - MoE model with 1T total parameters, 32B activated per token.

Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 76.8% (Pass@1)

Capabilities: Multimodal agentic capabilities with visual perception.
Supports extended context up to 256K tokens.
Function calling, long-context processing, advanced reasoning.

Architecture: Mixture-of-Experts architecture.
License: Commercial API access only.

Qwen3 VL 235B Cloud - Most powerful vision-language model in Qwen family.

Architecture: MoE (Mixture-of-Experts) 235B total, 22B activated per token.
Context: 128K tokens.

Capabilities: Advanced multimodal reasoning, image understanding,
visual question answering, document analysis, OCR,
complex vision-language tasks.

Supports 119 languages for text, vision tasks primarily in English.
License: Commercial API via Alibaba Cloud.

GLM-4-Plus from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 20
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves 82.7% on SWE-bench Verified, 89.3% on MMLU, 91.6% on HumanEval, and 80.1% on GPQA Diamond. The model demonstrates 95.7% accuracy on GSM8K and 82.9% on MATH benchmark. It scores 72.8% on TruthfulQA.

GLM-4.5 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 10
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

Qwen3 14B - Dense Transformer with QK-Norm. Parameter count: 14B. Max context: 128K tokens. Trained on 36T tokens across 119 languages. Apache 2.0 license.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: 81.05% (5-shot)
- MMLU-Pro: 61.03% (5-shot, CoT)
- GSM8K: 92.49% (4-shot, CoT)
- MATH: 62.02% (4-shot, CoT)
- HumanEval (EvalPlus): 72.23% (0-shot)
- MBPP: 73.40% (3-shot)
- BBH: 81.07% (3-shot, CoT)

Capabilities: Text generation, reasoning, coding, multilingual (119 languages), tool use (MCP protocol), thinking/non-thinking modes, agentic capabilities.

GLM-4.5-Air from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 5
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

DeepCoder - Fully open-source 14B parameter code generation model.

Benchmarks:
- LiveCodeBench optimized for code generation
- Comparable to O3-mini level on coding tasks

Architecture: 14B dense transformer optimized for code.
Context: 8K tokens.

Capabilities: Code completion, code generation, programming tasks,
multiple programming languages support.

License: Open source (community model)

GLM-4.6 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 3
**Parameters:** 32B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

Cogito 14B - Hybrid reasoning models optimized for coding and STEM.
Enable 'deep thinking subroutine' for complex reasoning tasks.
Strong performance on coding benchmarks with hybrid reasoning modes.

Architecture: Based on Llama architecture with hybrid reasoning enhancements.
Parameters: 14B active during inference.

Capabilities: Hybrid reasoning (instant vs deep thinking modes),
coding, STEM tasks, mathematical reasoning.

License: MIT

Cogito 2.1 671B Cloud - Largest Cogito model with hybrid reasoning.

Architecture: Dense transformer, 671B parameters.
Context: 128K tokens.

Capabilities: Hybrid reasoning (instant vs deep thinking modes),
coding, STEM tasks, mathematical reasoning, advanced problem solving.
Instruction-tuned with human feedback.

License: MIT

CogView-4-250304 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Image Generation Model
**Family:** CogView
**Concurrency Limit:** 5

Embedding Gemma - 300M parameter text embedding model from Google.
Built on Gemma architecture for efficient text embedding.

Architecture: 300M dense transformer.
Context: 8K tokens.

Capabilities: Text embeddings, semantic search,
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), sentence similarity.

License: Gemma Terms of Use

Llama 3.1 405B - State-of-the-art open model from Meta. Parameter count: 405B. Architecture: Dense Transformer with Grouped Query Attention. Max context length: 128K tokens.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: 85.2% (5-shot)
- HumanEval: 89% (0-shot)
- GSM8K: 96.8% (8-shot, CoT)
- DROP: 84.8% (F1 score)
- ARC-Challenge: 96.1%
- BBH: 87.5%
- MATH: 73.8%

Capabilities: Text generation, reasoning, coding, multilingual (8 languages), tool use, long context.

Multilingual, 128K context, tool use, Apache 2.0 license.

GLM-Image from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Image Generation Model
**Family:** GLM-Image
**Concurrency Limit:** 1

LLaVA (Large Language and Vision Assistant) - End-to-end multimodal model combining vision encoder with Vicuna language model.

Architecture: Vision encoder + Vicuna LLM.
Parameters: 7B / 13B variants available.
Context: 4K tokens (Vicuna base).

Capabilities: Visual question answering, image captioning,
multimodal conversation, OCR, visual reasoning.

Benchmar ks:
- VQAv2: ~71% (7B variant)
- OKVQA: ~45%
- GQA: ~60%

License: Apache 2.0 (vicuna weights subject to LLaMA license)

Qwen3 Embedding 0.6B - Compact text embeddings built on Qwen3 foundation.
Optimized for vector search and RAG applications.

Architecture: 0.6B parameter dense transformer.
Context: 32K tokens.

Capabilities: Text embeddings, semantic search,
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), vector similarity,
Multilingual support (Qwen3 heritage).

License: Apache 2.0

GLM-4.7-FlashX from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 3
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** fast, efficient inference

Nomic Embed Text - High-performing open embedding model with large token context window.

Architecture: BERT-based embedding model.
Context: 8K tokens.

Capabilities: Text embeddings, semantic search,
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), sentence similarity,
large context window for document embeddings.

Benchmar ks:
- Competitive with commercial embedding models
- Long context capability (8192 tokens)

License: Apache 2.0

GLM-5.1 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 1
**Parameters:** 32B
**Context Window:** 256K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** advanced reasoning and problem-solving

AutoGLM-Phone-Multilingual from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 5
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 32K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

DeepSeek V3.2 is an open-source model achieving 76.8% on SWE-bench Verified, 86.4% on MMLU, and 87.9% on HumanEval pass@1. It scores 72.3% on GPQA Diamond, 94.1% on GSM8K, and 79.8% on MATH. Performance on TruthfulQA stands at 68.9%.

MXBAI Embed Large - State-of-the-art large embedding model from mixedbread.ai.

Architecture: Dense transformer optimized for embeddings.
Context: 512 tokens (embedding model).

Capabilities: High-quality text embeddings, semantic search,
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), document retrieval,
sentence similarity, clustering.

Benchmar ks:
- MTEB leaderboard competitive performance
- Optimized for retrieval tasks

License: Apache 2.0

GLM-5 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 2
**Parameters:** 9B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

GLM-4.7 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 2
**Parameters:** 32B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis

Gemma 3 4B - Google's compact multimodal model for single-GPU deployment.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: ~72%
- Multimodal reasoning (MMMU-class tasks)

Architecture: Dense transformer, 4B parameters.
Context: 128K tokens.

Capabilities: Multimodal (text + image), 128K context,
140+ languages, vision-language tasks including captioning and visual QA.

License: Gemma Terms of Use
